column1: # Custom partition table for OTA on 16 MB flash (FNK0104AB ships 25VQ128).
# Same offsets for nvs/otadata/phy/app-start as eink-devdash so the web
# flasher manifest offsets stay familiar; the two OTA slots are 3 MB each
# (LVGL + fonts + TLS cert bundle need more headroom than the e-ink build).
# The nvs partition must never move or grow — partition-table changes do not
